id.description: The internally generated ID for the project.

name.description:
The name of the project.
Max length: 255

startDate.description: The estimated start date for the project, in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: The estimated end date for the project, in ISO 8601 format.

classification.description: The project’s purpose. Possible values: production, template, component, sample

projectValue.description: The value of the project. When updating the project value, both the value and currency parameters are required.

jobNumber.description:
A job identifier that’s defined for the project by the user. This ID was defined when the project was created.
Max length: 100

addressLine1.description:
Address line 1 for the project.
Max length: 255

addressLine2.description:
Address line 2 for the project.
Max length: 255

city.description: The city in which the project is located.

stateOrProvince.description: The state or province in which the project is located. Only valid state/province names and ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes is accepted. The provided state or province must exist in the country of the project.

postalCode.description: The zip or postal code in which the project is located.

country.description: The country in which the project is located. Only valid country names and ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes is accepted.

latitude.description: The latitude of the location of the project.

longitude.description: The longitude of the location of the project.

timezone.description: The time zone in which the project is located. Note that this field can be NULL.

constructionType.description: The construction type of the project. Following is a list of recommended values; however, any value is accepted.

deliveryMethod.description: The delivery method of the project. Following is a list of recommended values; however, any value is accepted.

contractType.description: The contract type of the project. Following is a list of recommended values; however, any value is accepted.

currentPhase.description: The current phase of the project. Following is a list of recommended values; however, any value is accepted.

businessUnitId.description: The ID of the business unit that the project is associated with.

lastSignIn.description: The timestamp of the last time someone signed into the project.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the project image.

thumbnailImageUrl.description: The URL of the project thumbnail image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the project was last updated, in ISO 8601 format. This reflects only changes to the project fields and not changes to any resources in the project.

accountId.description: The ID of the account the project is associated with.

sheetCount.description: The total number of sheets associated with the project.

products.description: An array of the product objects associated with the project.

platform.description: The APS platform that the project belongs to.

companyCount.description: The total number of companies associated with the project.

memberCount.description: The total number of members on the project.

templateId.description: The ID of the project that was used as a template to create this project.
